About: It is about a Frankish noble family.
AssociatedWith: It is associated with Charles Martel.
It is associated with Charlemagne.
It is associated with the Arnulfing clan.
It is associated with the Pippinid clan.
It is associated with the Papacy.
It is associated with the aristocracy.
It is associated with the Merovingian dynasty.
It is associated with the Franks.
It is associated with the Kingdom of France.
It is associated with the Holy Roman Empire.
BelongsTo: It belongs to the 7th century AD.
ConsistsOf: It consists of descendants of the Arnulfing and Pippinid clans.
CreatedAround: It was created around the 7th century AD.
CreatedIn: It was created in the 7th century AD.
CreatedTo: It was created to consolidate power in the 8th century.
HasA: It has a peak in 800 with the crowning of Charlemagne as the first emperor of the Romans in the West.
HasFeatureOf: It is characterized by making the offices of mayor of the palace and dux et princeps Francorum hereditary.
Influenced: It influenced the evolution of the Kingdom of France.
It influenced the evolution of the Holy Roman Empire.
IsA: It is a Frankish noble family.
KnownAs: It is known as the Carlovingians.
It is known as the Carolingi.
It is known as the Carolings.
It is known as the Karolinger.
It is known as the Karlings.
KnownFor: It is known for consolidating its power in the 8th century.
It is known for becoming the de facto rulers of the Franks.
It is known for reaching its peak in 800 with the crowning of Charlemagne as the first emperor of the Romans in the West.
NamedAfter: It is named after Charles Martel.
OccurredAround: It occurred around the 7th century AD.
OriginatedIn: It originated in the 7th century AD.
